ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "ref_area" TEXT /* Reference area/country code */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population segment (e.g., male, female) */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the health metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric value */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to collect the metric */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_health_metrics_ref_area FOREIGN KEY ("ref_area") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_health_metrics_classification FOREIGN KEY ("classification") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_health_metrics_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_health_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region or country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region or country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Full name of the region or country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area (e.g., continent, sub-region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender classification */,
  "gender_code" TEXT /* Code representing the gender (e.g., sex_f for female) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Code representing the age group (e.g., age_ythadult_y15_24) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Code representing the classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the classification (e.g., employment, health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_metadata" (
  "metric_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the health metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metadata_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES population_health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES population_health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation process */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Outcome of the validation process (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES population_health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)
